exploration_notes: The CRD validation-to-OpenAPI pipeline flows through these stages: (1) CRD validation spec: `CustomResourceValidation` in types.go holds `JSONSchemaProps` (types_jsonschema.go), the user-provided OpenAPI v3 schema. (2) Structural schema extraction: `NewStructural()` in convert.go converts `JSONSchemaProps` into the internal `Structural` type (structural.go), then `ValidateStructural()` (validation.go) validates structural invariants, and `Unfold()` (unfold.go) expands x-kubernetes-int-or-string
